signals.headline: US and Iran Eye Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US and Iran Eye Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires | NO | HIGH confidence**  
No ceasefire extension, deal, or resolution has been confirmed; weekend talks in Islamabad collapsed without agreement, but both sides are now discussing a second round of negotiations this week before the two-week ceasefire ends next week.[1][2][3]
